allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('rubric.json'\)\); print\('rubric OK:', len\(d\), 'criteria, R1-R%d'%len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('rubric.json'\)\); print\('rubric.json OK -', len\(d\), 'criteria'\); print\('numbers:', [c['number'] for c in d]\)")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python -c "import gdown, inspect; print\('file:', gdown.__file__\); print\('sig:', inspect.signature\(gdown.download\)\)")
